hooks.description: Block secrets files, validate branch naming
Enforce ticket reference in commit messages

hooks.prompt: A file was just written or edited. Check: (1) Does the file contain any secrets, API keys, passwords, or tokens? If yes, block and explain. (2) Does the file path match a secrets pattern (.env, .pem, credentials.*, secrets.*)? If yes, block and explain. If neither applies, approve.

hooks.description: Load memory index and topology if present
